name: Zoom
shortDescription: FlowRunner integration for [Zoom](https://zoom.us) — create and manage meetings, register attendees, fetch invitation text, work with cloud recordings, and list past-meeting participants through the [Zoom REST API v2](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/) using OAuth2.

actions.name: Create Meeting
actions.description: Creates a Zoom meeting for the connected user and returns its ID, join URL, and start URL. Supports instant, scheduled, and recurring (no fixed time) meetings, with optional waiting room, join-before-host, mute-on-entry, and automatic recording settings.

actions.name: Get Meeting
actions.description: Retrieves the full details of one meeting by its ID, including topic, schedule, join URL, and settings. Works for upcoming and live meetings hosted by the connected user.

actions.name: List Meetings
actions.description: Lists the connected user's meetings, filtered to scheduled, currently live, or upcoming meetings, with token-based pagination. Note: instant meetings and details like the agenda are not included in list results - use Get Meeting for full details.

actions.name: Update Meeting
actions.description: Updates an existing meeting's topic, schedule, agenda, password, or settings. Only the fields you provide are changed; everything else keeps its current value.

actions.name: Delete Meeting
actions.description: Deletes a meeting by its ID, removing it from the host's schedule. Registrants are not notified by this action. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: Get Meeting Invitation
actions.description: Retrieves the meeting's invitation text - the ready-to-send blurb with the join link, meeting ID, and passcode that Zoom generates for the host. Use this to email or message an invite from a flow.

actions.name: Add Meeting Registrant
actions.description: Registers a person for a meeting and returns their personal join URL. The meeting must have registration enabled (set up in the Zoom web portal when scheduling); otherwise Zoom rejects the request.

actions.name: List Meeting Registrants
actions.description: Lists the people registered for a meeting, including their name, email, status, and personal join URL, with token-based pagination. The meeting must have registration enabled.

actions.name: List Cloud Recordings
actions.description: Lists the connected user's cloud recordings within a date range (up to one month per request; defaults to the last 30 days), including per-file download URLs. Cloud recording requires a paid Zoom plan.

actions.name: Get Meeting Recordings
actions.description: Retrieves all cloud recording files of one meeting - video, audio, transcript, and chat files - each with its download URL. Cloud recording requires a paid Zoom plan; download URLs may require an access token appended for protected recordings.

actions.name: Delete Meeting Recordings
actions.description: Deletes all cloud recording files of a meeting, either moving them to the Zoom trash (recoverable for 30 days) or deleting them permanently. Cloud recording requires a paid Zoom plan.

actions.name: List Past Meeting Participants
actions.description: Lists everyone who attended a past meeting, with their name, email, and join/leave times. Requires a paid Zoom plan (Pro or higher); free accounts receive an error from Zoom.

actions.name: Get My User
actions.description: Retrieves the connected Zoom user's profile - name, email, account type, timezone, and personal meeting ID. Use this to identify the connected account or read its defaults.

idealUseCases: Auto-create scheduled or recurring Zoom meetings from form submissions, CRM deals, or calendar events, then share the join URL with attendees.
Register attendees for a meeting and email each person their personal join link.
Retrieve cloud recording download links after a meeting ends and archive them to storage or a spreadsheet.
Pull past-meeting participant reports (join/leave times) for attendance tracking and follow-up.
Fetch ready-to-send invitation text and post it to chat or email.
agentIdeas: Use **Google Calendar** "On Event Starting Soon" to detect an upcoming appointment, then call **Zoom** "Create Meeting" and share the join URL back onto the calendar event.
When **Fireflies.ai** "On New Transcript" fires, call **Zoom** "List Past Meeting Participants" to reconcile attendance, then **Google Sheets** "Add Row" to log who attended each meeting.
After a meeting, use **Zoom** "Get Meeting Recordings" to fetch the download links, then **Gmail** "Send Message" to email the recording to attendees.
